A '''Ssi-ruu''' was the [[Shreeftut]] of the [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium]] in the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During his reign, the Shreeftut began having dreams of a cloaked [[Human/Legends|Human]]: [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], contacting him through [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Palpatine had discovered the [[Ssi-ruu]]k during a Force-meditation and was attempting to negotiate with the Ssi-ruuk. In exchange for the ceding of a small number of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], the Shreeftut agreed to give the Emperor information on the [[entechment]] process, as well as information on their [[Droid/Legends|droid]] fighters. With the death of Emperor Palpatine at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Shreeftut ordered an [[Invasion of Bakura|invasion]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. However, the invasion was repulsed, and the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] was soon recalled, as [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]] was under attack by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]—or the [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo's Household Phalanx|Household Phalanx]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].<ref name="Bakura" />
